title: caltha natans var. arctica
intro: Caltha natans var. arctica, also known as the water caltha or northern marsh-marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Caltha natans var. arctica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Caltha natans var. arctica can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, and it is often used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
